# Lewis, Rao, Reiley - Measuring the Effects of Advertising

## URL

https://www.nber.org/system/files/working_papers/w19520/w19520.pdf

## Core point

Digital advertising creates new metrics and experimentation opportunities, but causal measurement remains difficult; clicks alone are not causal proof.

## Use inside this pack

Use as anti-dashboard-delusion foundation.

## Agent instruction

When this source applies, convert it into an executable campaign or measurement artifact. Do not merely cite it.

## Reliability note

Classify this source as official platform/regulator/academic depending on the source. Prefer direct platform documentation for platform behavior and academic/field-experiment sources for measurement discipline.
